Label: Select Network Interface
Notes: Dynamically populated from available network interfaces
Hover help text in the status bar: Select the Network Interface.

Label: Current IPv4
Notes: Read-only. Shows IP address of the Processor on the selected interface.
Hover help text in the status bar: IP address of the Processor.

Label: UDP Port
Notes: UDP Receive Port of the Processor.
Hover help text in the status bar: UDP Receive Port of the Processor.

Label: TCP Port
Notes: TCP Receive Port of the Processor.
Hover help text in the status bar: TCP Receive Port of the Processor.

Label: OSC Query Enable
Notes: Enable/disable OSC Query server for automatic parameter discovery via HTTP/WebSocket.
Hover help text in the status bar: Enable/disable OSC Query server for automatic parameter discovery via HTTP/WebSocket.

Label: OSC Query Port
Notes: HTTP port for OSC Query discovery. Browsable at http://localhost:<port>/
Hover help text in the status bar: HTTP port for OSC Query discovery. Other apps can browse parameters at http://localhost:<port>/

Label: OSC Source Filter
Notes: Controls which OSC senders are accepted on the Rx ports.
Hover help text in the status bar: Filter incoming OSC: Accept All sources or only Registered connections with Rx enabled.

Label: Open Log Window
Notes: Opens the Network Log floating window.
Hover help text in the status bar: Open Network Logging window.

Label: Add Target/Server
Notes: At the end of the empty row after all targets. Max 6 targets/servers.
Hover help text in the status bar: Add new network target.

Label: Target/Server Name
Notes: For each target/server (up to 6 targets/servers)
Hover help text in the status bar: Network Target Name.

Label: Target/Server Data Mode
Notes: For each target/server (up to 6 targets/servers)
Hover help text in the status bar: Select UDP or TCP data transmission.

Label: Target/Server IPv4
Notes: For each target/server (up to 6 targets/servers)
Hover help text in the status bar: IP Address of the Target (use 127.0.0.1 for local host).

Label: Target/Server Tx Port
Notes: For each target/server (up to 6 targets/servers)
Hover help text in the status bar: Transmit Port for this Target.

Label: Target/Server Rx Enable
Notes: For each target/server (up to 6 targets/servers)
Hover help text in the status bar: Enable or Disable Data Reception.

Label: Target/Server Tx Enable
Notes: For each target/server (up to 6 targets/servers)
Hover help text in the status bar: Enable or Disable Data Transmission.

Label: Target/Server Protocol
Notes: For each target/server (up to 6 targets/servers). Stored values: 0=DISABLED, 1=OSC, 2=Remote, 3=ADM-OSC, 7=QLab (4-6 reserved).
Hover help text in the status bar: Select the Protocol: DISABLED, OSC, REMOTE, or ADM-OSC.

Label: Target/Server QLab Patch
Notes: For each QLab target. Visible/editable only when Protocol == QLab.
Hover help text in the status bar: Patch number used when sending cues to this QLab target.

Label: Remove Target/Server
Notes: For each target/server. With confirmation dialog.
Hover help text in the status bar: Delete this Network Target.

Label: Find My Remote
Notes: Opens a password prompt, then sends /findDevice <password> to all REMOTE targets.
Hover help text in the status bar: Make your Remote Flash and Buzz to Find it.

Label: Find Device Password
Notes: Entered in the Find My Remote dialog. Stored for reuse.
Hover help text in the status bar: Password for the Find My Remote command.

Label: Store Network Config
Notes: Long-press. Saves current network configuration to file and creates a backup.
Hover help text in the status bar: Store Network Configuration to file.

Label: Reload Network Config
Notes: Long-press. Reloads Network Configuration from file.
Hover help text in the status bar: Reload Network Configuration from file.

Label: Reload Network Config Backup
Notes: Long-press. Reloads Network Configuration from the backup file.
Hover help text in the status bar: Reload Network Configuration from backup file.

Label: Import Network Config
Notes: Long-press. Opens a file picker to import a Network Configuration.
Hover help text in the status bar: Import Network Configuration from file.

Label: Export Network Config
Notes: Long-press. Opens a file picker to export the current Network Configuration.
Hover help text in the status bar: Export Network Configuration to file.

Label: ADM Mapping Selector
enum: Cartesian 1 ; Cartesian 2 ; Cartesian 3 ; Cartesian 4 ; Polar 1 ; Polar 2 ; Polar 3 ; Polar 4
Notes: Selects which of the 8 ADM-OSC mappings (4 Cart + 4 Polar) is shown in the editor panel.
Hover help text in the status bar: Select an ADM-OSC mapping to configure. Cart = Cartesian (xyz), Polar = spherical (aed).

Label: Link All Sides
Notes: Symmetric-edit mode. When ON, all 6 Cartesian sides (+/-X, +/-Y, +/-Z) are edited together.
Hover help text in the status bar: Select all 6 sides at once for uniform editing.

Label: Cart 1 Axis X Source Axis
enum: ADM X ; ADM Y ; ADM Z
Notes: For Cartesian mapping 1, internal axis X. Stored on ADMCartAxis child node of the Cartesian mapping. Defaults to matching axis (ADM X).
Hover help text in the status bar: Which incoming ADM-OSC axis maps to this internal axis.

Label: Cart 1 Axis X Invert
Notes: For Cartesian mapping 1, internal axis X. Stored on ADMCartAxis child node of the Cartesian mapping.
Hover help text in the status bar: Invert the sign of the incoming axis value.

Label: Cart 1 Axis X Center
Notes: For Cartesian mapping 1, internal axis X. Stored on ADMCartAxis child node of the Cartesian mapping.
Hover help text in the status bar: Physical position (m) where normalized 0.0 maps to.

Label: Cart 1 Axis X Breakpoint
Notes: For Cartesian mapping 1, internal axis X. Stored on ADMCartAxis child node of the Cartesian mapping. Normalized breakpoint of the piecewise-linear mapping.
Hover help text in the status bar: Normalized breakpoint (0-1) for piecewise linear stretch.

Label: Cart 1 Axis X Pos Inner Width
Notes: For Cartesian mapping 1, internal axis X. Stored on ADMCartAxis child node of the Cartesian mapping. Extent from center to breakpoint on the positive side.
Hover help text in the status bar: Physical extent (m) from center to breakpoint.

Label: Tracking Enabled
Notes: Global enable for all tracking input.
Hover help text in the status bar: Enable or Disable Incoming Tracking data processing.

Label: Tracking Protocol
Notes: Greyed out but editable if trackingEnabled == 0.
Hover help text in the status bar: Select the type of Tracking Protocol.

Label: Tracking Rx Port
Notes: Greyed out but editable if trackingEnabled == 0.
Hover help text in the status bar: Specify the Port to receive Tracking data.

Label: Tracking OSC Path
Notes: Visible only when Tracking Protocol == OSC. Must start with '/'.
Hover help text in the status bar: OSC Path for the Tracking in OSC Mode (starts with a /).

Label: Tracking PSN Interface
Notes: Visible only when Tracking Protocol == PSN. Dynamically populated from network interfaces.
Hover help text in the status bar: Network interface for PSN multicast reception.

Label: Tracking MQTT Host
Notes: Visible only when Tracking Protocol == MQTT. MQTT broker hostname or IP.
Hover help text in the status bar: MQTT broker hostname or IP.

Label: Tracking MQTT Topic
Notes: Visible only when Tracking Protocol == MQTT. Topic to subscribe to.
Hover help text in the status bar: MQTT topic to subscribe for tracking data.

Label: Tracking MQTT Tag IDs
Notes: Visible only when Tracking Protocol == MQTT. Opens a dialog to map MQTT tag IDs to WFS input channel IDs.
Hover help text in the status bar: Edit the mapping of MQTT tag IDs to WFS input channel IDs.

Label: Tracking MQTT JSON X Field
Notes: Visible only when Tracking Protocol == MQTT. Editable; auto-populated from discovered JSON keys in the MQTT payload.
